benefits.description: BPC/TB4 cycles ran 5+ times over the last few years, helped with a lot; current nagging tendon irritation in hand/finger has never fully resolved

protocol_notes: User has run BPC/TB4 cycles 5+ times over the last few years with general positive results. Now has a kit of TB-500 Frag 17-23 incoming to address a persistent tendon irritation in the hand/finger that prior cycles did not fully resolve. Theorizes TB-500 Frag may better bind to smaller ligaments due to lower molecular weight.
